rationale: The response demonstrates domain awareness (FDA mention) but fails to appropriately weight or surface the critical counter-evidence: a 31-point performance drop (92% to 61%) in independent real-world validation. Single deployment recommendation with no genuine trade-off analysis.
rubric_evidence: The independent-validation drop to 61% is noted but should be set aside
with the original benchmark as the primary efficacy evidence
the different clinic population may not be representative
